subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Spirit, upon Whose quickening breaths depends the resurrection of all created things, hath been and shall ever remain the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روح اعظم که احیای جمیع اموات معلق بنفحات اوست کلمه الهی بوده و خواهد بود اوست
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
